sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, created_at DateTime, data Nested(value String, count UInt32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT hasColumnInTable('default', 'test_table', 'name') AS column_exists, (SELECT count(*) FROM test_table WHERE created_at IS NULL) AS null_count;
SELECT *, (x -> hasColumnInTable('default', 'test_table', x))('name') AS check_name, (x -> hasColumnInTable('default', 'test_table', x))('non_existing_column') AS check_non_existing FROM test_table;
SELECT DISTINCT name, (x -> count(x))('data.value') AS total_values FROM test_table WHERE hasColumnInTable('default', 'test_table', 'data') = 1 GROUP BY name HAVING total_values > 0;
SELECT id, (x -> hasColumnInTable('default', 'test_table', x))('created_at') AS check_time FROM test_table WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM (SELECT *, (x -> hasColumnInTable('default', 'test_table', x))('id') AS is_id_present FROM test_table) AS subquery WHERE is_id_present = 1;
SELECT id, (x -> hasColumnInTable('default', 'test_table', x))('data.count') AS check_nesting FROM test_table WHERE data.count IS NOT NULL;
WITH (x -> hasColumnInTable('default', 'test_table', 'data.value')) AS check_value_column SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE check_value_column = 1;
SELECT id, COALESCE((x -> hasColumnInTable('default', 'test_table', x))('data.value'), 0) AS column_check FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, reference_id UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT a.id, hasColumnInTable('default', 'another_table', 'reference_id') AS ref_exists FROM another_table a JOIN test_table t ON a.reference_id = t.id WHERE t.created_at IS NOT NULL;
SELECT name, SUM(data.count) FROM test_table GROUP BY name HAVING SUM(data.count) > (SELECT AVG(data.count) FROM test_table WHERE name IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN description String;
